Red review requested narrowing tests to exact NLSpec Done coverage:
- Remove `broad_round_trip_across_entire_supported_range` because exhaustive 1..=3999 round-trip is beyond the Done checklist.
- Remove additional invalid/non-canonical cases beyond the Done-required invalid set.
- Remove the embedded invalid-character case `from_roman("XII!")`; keep only `ix` and `ABC` from the Done checklist for invalid-character examples.
Keep all golden vectors, representative round-trips, range errors, empty input, required invalid/non-canonical inputs, and the integration smoke test.
